hero.title: Your car's service history, always at hand
hero.description: Service Book is a simple tool to log and track maintenance records for all your vehicles — oil changes, inspections, repairs, and more.

multipleCars.title: Multiple Cars
multipleCars.description: Keep track of all your vehicles in one place.

serviceRecords.title: Service Records
serviceRecords.description: Log every oil change, inspection, and repair with date and mileage.

fullHistory.title: Full History
fullHistory.description: See the complete service history of each car at a glance.

yourData.title: Your Data
yourData.description: Private and secure — only you can see your records.

demo.title: Not sure what you're getting?
demo.description: Browse a fully working demo with sample car data — service records, maintenance schedule, cost chart. No account needed.

landing.footer: Service Book — track what matters for your car

register.title: Create account
register.description: Start tracking your car service history
